LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MercenaryGunner.degreeDatas.0: {PAWN_nameDef} is a hired gunner and only performs gunner duties and basic work.
{PAWN_nameDef} is a hired warrior and only performs warrior duties and basic work.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MercenaryDoctor.degreeDatas.0: {PAWN_nameDef} is a hired doctor and only performs doctor duties and basic work.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MercenaryCook.degreeDatas.0.d: {PAWN_nameDef} is a hired cook and only performs cook duties and basic work.
{PAWN_nameDef} is a hired builder and only performs construction duties and basic work.
{PAWN_nameDef} is a hired miner and only performs mining duties and basic work.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MercenaryFarmer.degreeDatas.0: {PAWN_nameDef} is a hired farmer and only performs farming duties and basic work.
{PAWN_nameDef} is a hired handler and only performs animal handling duties and basic work.
{PAWN_nameDef} is a hired crafter and only performs crafting duties and basic work.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MercenaryArtist.degreeDatas.0: {PAWN_nameDef} is a hired artist and only performs art duties and basic work.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MercenaryNegotiator.degreeDat: {PAWN_nameDef} is a hired negotiator and only performs negotiation duties and basic work.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MercenaryResearcher.degreeDat: {PAWN_nameDef} is a hired researcher and only performs research duties and basic work.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MercenaryPorter.degreeDatas.0: {PAWN_nameDef} is a hired porter and only hauls, cleans, and performs basic work.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MercenaryWorkerApprentice.deg: {PAWN_nameDef} works faster while performing hired specialty work.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MercenaryWorkerSkilled.degree: {PAWN_nameDef} works faster while performing hired specialty work.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MercenaryWorkerMaster.degreeD: {PAWN_nameDef} works faster while performing hired specialty work.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MercenaryCombatApprentice.deg: {PAWN_nameDef} has battlefield survival training and takes less damage.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MercenaryCombatSkilled.degree: {PAWN_nameDef} has battlefield survival training and takes less damage.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MercenaryCombatMaster.degreeD: {PAWN_nameDef} has battlefield survival training and takes less damage.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MercenaryPorterApprentice.deg: {PAWN_nameDef} has basic porter training, improving movement, carrying capacity, and cleaning speed slightly.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MercenaryPorterSkilled.degree: {PAWN_nameDef} has skilled porter training, improving movement, carrying capacity, and cleaning speed.
LanguageData.ClashOfRim_MercenaryPorterMaster.degreeD: {PAWN_nameDef} is an expert porter with strong movement, carrying capacity, and cleaning speed bonuses.
